action.reasoning: Observation: 3 epochs took 90 min, val_f1=0.0086 (very low). Analysis: Model is still early in training. Need to submit eval to get baseline, then train longer. The slow training (90min/3epochs) means I have ~4 more training runs possible. Decision: Submit eval with current checkpoint to get baseline score, then immediately start longer training with better hyperparameters. I'll also optimize training speed by using larger batch size and fewer workers.
